subcodes.first_line: O my God and the God of all creation, my Beloved and the Beloved of all who dwell in earth and heaven, I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و اله من فی الانشاء و محبوبی و محبوب من فی الارض و السماء اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
